harmain-service-platform.description: From challenges and constraints to solutions and outcomes, explore the journey behind the work.

description: How we rebuilt Harmain Service Provider, a multi-service marketplace platform, from the ground up - branding, design, and a fully functional booking platform.

heading.title: A Growing Business Trapped Inside An Outdated

description: Harmain had a website, but it wasn't built to support a modern service marketplace.
• Outdated technology made the platform slow and difficult to maintain.
• No functional backend existed to manage services, bookings, or customer interactions.
• The brand lacked a clear identity, with no logo system, visual consistency, or trust building elements.
• Navigation was confusing, making it difficult for users to understand services and take action.
The result was a platform that had no online presence and lacked the foundation needed to support growth, build trust, and convert visitors into customers.

heading.title: A Unified Approach To Brand, UX &

description: Rather than fixing isolated issues, we rebuilt the platform from the ground up, aligning branding, design, and technology into one connected system.
----What We Built
• A complete brand identity, including logo, visual language, and brand guidelines
• A user-centered experience focused on service discovery and booking
• A custom frontend and backend architecture built for marketplace operations
• Service listings, user accounts, booking management, and order tracking
• A cart-based booking flow with integrated payment processing
---Tech Used
Front End- Nextjs, Tailwind, Lucide-icons, Tanstack Query, Cloudinary, Axios, Zustand, Sonner
Backend End- Node js, Express, Gupshup client, Mongodb, Mongoose, Tanstack Query
The platform evolved from a basic online presence into a fully operational service marketplace.
----What Changed
• Establishment of a strong and consistent brand identity
• Improved trust and credibility across the customer journey
• Simplified how users discover, compare, and book services
• Streamlined business operations through a dedicated platform
• Created a scalable digital foundation for future growth
---The Result
Harmain now has a platform that not only represents the business professionally but also supports real customers, real transactions, and day-to-day operations.

turey-agri-identity-system.description: From challenges and constraints to solutions and outcomes, explore the journey behind the work.

description: How we created a brand identity system for Turey Agri, a company that provides agricultural solutions to farmers.

heading.title: A Growing Business Without A Recognizable

description: Turey Agri had established itself in the agricultural market, but its visual identity didn't reflect the professionalism of the business.
Branding was inconsistent across touchpoints, social media lacked a unified direction, and there was no system to build recognition or trust among growers.
---The Challenges
• No distinctive or memorable brand identity
• Inconsistent visuals across digital platforms
• Social media lacked a cohesive communication style
• Limited brand recognition in a competitive market
• Marketing assets weren't aligned with business goals

heading.title: Building A Brand Farmers Could Recognize And

description: Rather than creating isolated creatives, we developed a complete brand system that brought consistency to every customer touchpoint, from the logo and identity to social media and advertising.
---What We Delivered
----Brand Identity
• Logo redesign
• Brand color palette
• Typography & visual guidelines
----Creative Communication
• Social media creative direction
• Product-focused campaigns
• Educational content for growers
----Marketing
• Meta advertising campaigns
• Consistent campaign creatives
• Performance-focused visual assets

heading.title: A Brand Built For Recognition And

description: The project transformed Turey Agri from a business with inconsistent branding into a recognizable agricultural brand with a professional and consistent market presence.
---What This Project Achieved
• Established a memorable and professional brand identity
• Created consistency across every customer touchpoint
• Improved brand recognition through cohesive visual communication
• Built a stronger social media presence with educational and promotional content
• Supported marketing efforts with high-quality campaign creatives
---The Result
Turey Agri now presents a consistent and trustworthy brand across digital platforms, strengthening customer confidence while creating a scalable foundation for future marketing and business growth.
